Employment Opportunities
 
Thank you for your interest in employment with the Sea to Sky School District. We pride ourselves on ensuring excellent employee relations, providing a supportive environment, and maintaining a district focus on best practices.
 
We invite you to explore our current employment opportunities by clicking on the link below. Postings include administrative positions, exempt staff positions, support and teaching staff positions, as well as teacher-on-call and casual support positions.
 
We ask that all applications for vacancies be submitted through the Make A Future website.
 
Internal Applicants:
 
If you are a current employee, please apply on Make a Future as an ‘Internal Applicant’. HERE is a step-by-step guide to help you through the process of registering as an internal applicant.
 
HR Handout (8.5 × 11 in) (1)
